calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Jan-08-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of an adult and Two Minors.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Petitioners Zin Ziang Zhu and Rui Ying Zhen were present in pro per as Guardians ad litem for the Minors, Can Wen Zhen and Xiao Yu Zhu.
Allen Li was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioners.
Proof of Publication in the file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Henry Xin-Xiang Zhu.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minors to: Ken Jin-Min Zhu and Tracy Xiao-Yu Zhu.

Decree Changing Names was submitted to and signed by the Court.
